ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passenger_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "country_pair" TEXT /* Pair of countries for the forecast */,
  "origin_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin country */,
  "destination_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the forecast */,
  "time_attribute" TEXT /* Time attribute combining year and month */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Forecasted passenger count */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (forecasted or actual) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the forecast */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* System or process that generated the forecast */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the forecast record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_forecasts_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_forecasts_destination_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_forecasts_origin_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_forecasts_country_pair FOREIGN KEY ("country_pair") REFERENCES country_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_forecasts_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_forecasts_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Standard country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country pair */,
  "origin_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin country */,
  "destination_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination country */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance between the origin and destination countries */,
  "travel_time" TEXT /* Average travel time between the origin and destination countries */,
  "popular_routes" TEXT /* Information about the popularity of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* The year value */,
  "is_forecast_year" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is a forecast year */,
  "forecast_horizon" TEXT /* Forecast horizon (short-term, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_value" INTEGER /* The month value */,
  "is_forecast_month" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the month is a forecast month */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_forecast" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data type is forecasted or actual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, airline representative, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES passenger_forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast record used in the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for generating the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the generated report file */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is private or public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES passenger_forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast record being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the collaboration is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES passenger_forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
